name: OPTIC DRUSEN
definition: accretions of hyaline material on / near surface of optic disc; often familial

demographics.Age: patient with macular degeneration; also in young patient
demographics.Location: at junction of retina + optic nerve; bilateral in 75%

distribution: at junction of retina + optic nerve; bilateral in 75%
discriminating_features: hyperechoic lesions at papilla + acoustic shadowing

US: hyperechoic lesions at papilla + acoustic shadowing
